blocks.content: Ryan Callaway was in Daisy's English class.
Kit found this out on the walk to school — she mentioned it in passing.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: There's a guy in my English class who's actually read the book we're doing. Like, already read it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: We're all supposed to have read it.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I know. But he'd read it before it was assigned. On his own. He had opinions about it.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Good ones. He said things in class discussion that the teacher hadn't even brought up.
Kit thought about this for about half a block.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Ryan. Ryan Callaway. He moved here from Augusta.
She looked at him with the sideways expression she used when she was deciding whether something was worth pushing. She decided it wasn't. They walked the rest of the way to school.
